message: I was on the roof.
The roof of Building B.
This is a great place to be alone, since you can only get here by crossing over from the Building A roof.
Though I feel like all the other lowlifes avoid coming here since it's where I usually hang out.
Either way, I don't have to deal with anyone else if I come here.
Of course, I don't like to see Mamiya Takuji's face, but I'm not really fond of chatting with anyone else either.
So I prefer deserted places.
Though the roof is kind of hot...
Like always... the sky was clear and blue.
A clear summer day in summer is the same as a sweltering hot one.
Especially up here on the roof, where the sun heats the concrete to the point where it could burn you.
Over on the Building A roof, where there's no shade, you could get a farmer's tan (where only the uncovered parts of your skin get sunburnt) in just minutes.
That's why this is such a nice spot.
The Building B roof is lower and provides more shade than the others. A nice breeze blows in from the nearby copse, too.
It's not as cool as indoors, where it's air-conditioned, but for being outside in the sun, the heat and humidity here are about ideal.
But it's still a really hot day...
It's like a sound... or maybe, like a slight pain... A unique, characteristic texture.
It's not an external stimulus... It's the signal of a change within me.

name: Tomosane
message: "This feeling... I don't think this is Mamiya Takuji..."
Each of us feels different from the others.
It's a subtle difference, but there's definitely a difference depending on who's about to appear.
"Heeere."

name: Tomosane
message: "Long time no see... Can I say that here?"
"Why not?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki..."

name: Yuki
message: "It's been a while, hasn't it? I'm not entirely sure, though... What's today? What day in what month of what year?"

name: Tomosane
message: "There's a phone in your pocket... Why don't you look yourself?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, right. I forgot... Whoa!
No way, it's already summer. That's why it's so hot, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, it's hot out today."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh yeah, give me a cigarette."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah right..."

name: Yuki
message: "Don't be cheap... I'm your big sister, you know?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm smoking one right now. That means there's one in your mouth too..."

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, you're right... Is this Never Knows Best?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You just realized that? It should be obvious..."

name: Yuki
message: "It wasn't obvious to me. Well, you're right. You picked out my favorite brand, just for me."

name: Yuki
message: "You're such a nice kid, picking out an obscure brand like this just for your big sister."

name: Tomosane
message: "I didn't buy them for you... And what do you mean, big sister?"

name: Yuki
message: "You're awfully slow to notice that one... But isn't it basically true? I was born before you, after all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Is being born first really enough to make you my big sister? In that case, the old lady at the corner store and that old woman who directs traffic are both big sisters to me too..."

name: Yuki
message: "And we're related by blood too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I suppose we are... And we also happen to be related by our blood vessels, muscles, brains, and the fat on our asses."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, perfect. I'm more than just a big sister, then... Do you think that makes us lovers?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't even want to hear a joke like that... Besides, I'm not a narcissist."

name: Yuki
message: "So do you hate yourself?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No... I don't love or hate myself..."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, really... I happen to be rather fond of myself. I think I'm a pretty awesome person."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, of course you are... You're the person Mamiya Takuji most wanted to become. There'd be no point if you hated yourself."

name: Yuki
message: "Hmmm... I wonder about that..."

name: Tomosane
message: "So what do you want?"

name: Yuki
message: "Nothing... I just woke up, and I was here."

name: Yuki
message: "If anything, I should ask you why we're out here in the heat... under the clear blue sky."

name: Tomosane
message: "Sorry about that... Unlike you, I prefer my skies to be clear."

name: Yuki
message: "What's that supposed to mean? It's not like I don't like clear skies."

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you talking about... I'm sure I heard you say you liked cloudy skies because it covers up the awful blue sky spreading out into the infinite..."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, I like the rain. Rainclouds are really great."

name: Yuki
message: "But when it rains, the water puts out my cigarettes... That's kind of a bummer."

name: Tomosane
message: "If you're smoking it, it won't go out..."

name: Yuki
message: "Really? It always goes out before I even notice..."

name: Yuki
message: "So maybe clear blue skies are all right too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't ask me... You're the one who said you didn't like them."

name: Yuki
message: "But isn't it really hot out here in the sun? We gonna die out here or something?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hell no. It's not even that hot here. We're in the shade..."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, you're right... The shade is nice and cool. The breeze feels good too."
Yuki sat down next to me.

name: Tomosane
message: "...Don't sit there. It's too hot, even if you don't really exist."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm afraid your big sister can't respect that opinion. It's no different than claiming it's a violation of human rights when a 2D girl in an eroge gets raped."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's totally different... And you're not my sister."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, come now... That's cold."
It's kind of odd. The Yuki next to me doesn't actually exist. Though, from her perspective, I guess I'm the one that doesn't actually exist.
But regardless, when she sat next to me, I clearly felt the warmth and texture of her skin.
In other words...

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't sit next to me! I don't care if you're not really there! It's too damn hot!"

name: Yuki
message: "I am actually here! You're awfully rude, you know? To me, you're the one that's not actually there!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Anyway, get away from me... You're annoying."

name: Yuki
message: "Don't order me around. You're annoying."

name: Tomosane
message: "What?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Haa... You try to act like you're so cool, but then you go and act like that. Maybe you should work on staying in character a bit more..."

name: Tomosane
message: "The hell are you talking about?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, you're wearing your glasses. Does that mean... Oh, you're reading something. What's this?"

name: Tomosane
message: "A book."

name: Yuki
message: "That's not what I meant. What's the title... Huh, what's this? Wow, The Squirrel Cage? This looks like some scifi book! It's kinda creepy too..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Shut up... Don't touch it, stupid."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm not hurting it. Don't be such a brat."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm not a brat! Who the hell do you think you are?!"

name: Yuki
message: "What, you don't remember? I'm Minakami Yuki. It's just your name backward."

name: Tomosane
message: "Is not..."

name: Yuki
message: "Sure it does. You can read the kanji in Tomosane like Minakami, and Yuuki sounds just like Yuki... Look! It's basically the same name."

name: Tomosane
message: "It sounds like you're just making up readings."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, I guess so... It is awfully arbitrary."

name: Tomosane
message: "No kidding... That's really arbitrary."

name: Yuki
message: "Also, I think it's happened... a few more times."

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you blabbering about all of a sudden?"

name: Yuki
message: "My memory has gotten a lot more fragmented... and I haven't seen Hasaki-chan much at all lately."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh right, you mentioned that before... That Hasaki's rabbit doll looked like a human to you..."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm sure he really doesn't want to see that doll."

name: Tomosane
message: "Doesn't want to see it, huh? Giving her that doll was one of the few times he was actually nice to her..."

name: Yuki
message: "He was nice to her at least once, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Well yeah..."

name: Yuki
message: "That might be it... Maybe Mamiya Takuji doesn't want to see it because it reminds him that he's supposed to be nice to his little sister..."

name: Tomosane
message: "A boy's love for his little sister..."

name: Yuki
message: "And I heard Hasaki-chan's doll was actually named Kagami. Now that's a crazy name if I ever heard one."

name: Tomosane
message: "You think?"

name: Yuki
message: "And Hasaki-chan's name is Tsukasa. Tsukasa and Kagami are the names of the twins from the anime that jerk likes to watch, you know?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh really? I wouldn't know... More importantly, Hasaki and the doll really look like twins?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hahahahaha, yeah, they do. Hasaki-chan and the rabbit doll look like twins. I can't believe the kind of delusions that guy has."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, and they look just like two sisters from some game he was playing."

name: Tomosane
message: "I see. Pretty much what I would expect from him. Even his fantasies are self-loathing."

name: Tomosane
message: "Self-loathing fantasies, huh... The first thing that pops into his mind is self-loathing."

name: Yuki
message: "I guess so... And the two of us are products of that same self-loathing imagination too..."

name: Tomosane
message: "At least he's consistent."

name: Yuki
message: "I wonder about that... I'm not really sure, to be honest."

name: Yuki
message: "...We might not see each other again."

name: Tomosane
message: "That came out of the blue..."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well... keep up the good fight..."

name: Yuki
message: "No, we might be able to see each other for a bit longer!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Which one is it?"

name: Yuki
message: "Which one do you think?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Uh, that's what I just asked you."

name: Yuki
message: "Could you at least sound a little disappointed? What if you never see your big sis ever again?! Come on! Aren't you sad?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Not at all."

name: Yuki
message: "Yes, you are! You're completely heartbroken!"

name: Yuki
message: "...At least, I'm sad about it..."

name: Tomosane
message: "About what?"

name: Yuki
message: "That I won't see you again..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "Don't make that face. You should be happy that a girl is saying this to you."

name: Tomosane
message: "You call yourself a girl, anyway."

name: Yuki
message: "What? Do you wanna test that hypothesis?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wha― St-Stop!"

name: Yuki
message: "Here, here, feel my chest."

name: Tomosane
message: "K-Knock it off! Are you some bitch in heat?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, come on. It's your own body. Go on, touch it."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, thank you."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why do you have to feel so real?! It's nasty! I can even feel your body heat!"

name: Yuki
message: "Usually they call this phenomenon a phantom limb... The human brain really is full of mysteries."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's not a mystery, it's just a malfunction. That much should be obvious."

name: Yuki
message: "A malfunction that lets you feel up a woman whenever you want. Isn't that perfect? Here, feel my boobs."

name: Tomosane
message: "I told you to knock it off, dumbass!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh? What... would you prefer to get under my skirt?"

name: Tomosane
message: "D-Don't lift your skirt, you retard!"

name: Yuki
message: "What's the matter? I thought I was just an illusion. What are you getting so worked up about? Hehehehehe..."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's not funny... Have you no shame?"

name: Yuki
message: "Shame? Of course I do."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then don't lift your skirt up in public!"

name: Yuki
message: "Who cares? Not like anyone but you can see."

name: Tomosane
message: "But I can see you just fine!"

name: Yuki
message: "Who cares about that?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm telling you, I care! Jeez... Knock it off already. You're annoying."

name: Yuki
message: "You don't seem to like me much, Tomosane."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're the personality Mamiya Takuji desired... I don't care for people like you at all."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha... That hurts."

name: Tomosane
message: "Dumbass..."

name: Tomosane
message: "So why do you think we won't ever see each other again?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, that. Yeah, the times when I forget about you, and about Hasaki-chan... Those times are getting longer."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's happened a lot in the past, hasn't it?"

name: Yuki
message: "It's about the frequency. It's completely different from before."

name: Tomosane
message: "So you're saying it's way worse than the other times it happened..."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, way worse... And at the same time, I can't remember people's names or faces very well."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, if a doll looks like a person to you, I can understand why you'd have trouble remembering faces."

name: Yuki
message: "I wonder if I'll get cut off altogether..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Cut off, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Then I guess my job is about over too... I need to finish up soon."

name: Yuki
message: "Hey, Tomosane."

name: Tomosane
message: "What?"

name: Yuki
message: "Um, Tomosane..."
Yuki, always one to tease and play around...
For some reason she looked awfully serious.
She's never said anything good when she looks like this.

name: Yuki
message: "It would be better if you didn't spend so much time thinking about why you exist..."

name: Yuki
message: "It's not like your only purpose in life was to erase Mamiya Takuji."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's not like I came up with that myself... It's just the truth."

name: Yuki
message: "There's no way that's the truth."

name: Tomosane
message: "It is... That's the reason why I was made."

name: Yuki
message: "Mamiya Takuji isn't God... Just because that's what he wanted you to be doesn't mean your life's purpose is set in stone."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then what about you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You're the personality Mamiya Takuji desired. He wanted to be erased and killed by me, leaving you as the sole remaining personality."

name: Yuki
message: "I told you, that's not set in stone."

name: Tomosane
message: "Isn't it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Then do you think all three of us should continue living within one person?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Do you think something so unnatural is even possible?"

name: Yuki
message: "W-Well..."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's just natural that you should become Mamiya Takuji... The two of us are nothing but noise..."

name: Yuki
message: "That's just messed up! I'm a girl, you know! And Hasaki-chan looks like two people to me! That's not natural at all!"

name: Tomosane
message: "About that... Have you ever heard about glasses that flip your vision vertically and horizontally?"

name: Yuki
message: "What are you talking about? I'm trying to be serious here. Don't change the subject."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm not changing the subject... I'm just responding to your doubts."

name: Yuki
message: "How is that a response?"

name: Tomosane
message: "When you first put on those glasses... you feel downright nauseous..."

name: Yuki
message: "Well of course you do... What about it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "But interestingly enough... you can get used to it in just a day's time..."

name: Yuki
message: "Get used to it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's right. If you think about it, it makes sense. When you try to grab hold of something, you can't even move your hand properly because the directions are inverted."

name: Tomosane
message: "But once you get used to it, that inverted world becomes the normal one"

name: Yuki
message: "What does that have to do with our situation?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Even if you're looking at a completely different world from everyone else, so long as your actions aren't noticeably different, no one can tell there's any discrepancy."

name: Tomosane
message: "Even if you think you're acting like a woman... anyone else who looks at you thinks you're acting just as any other man would."

name: Yuki
message: "Really?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... Do you know what you sound like when you talk?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? I don't notice anything weird..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Did you know that you sound like a guy to other people?"

name: Yuki
message: "S-Seriously? That's kind of gross."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, like I said... Mamiya Takuji and I are the only ones who see you as anything but a normal male."

name: Yuki
message: "What? That's scary."

name: Tomosane
message: "Dumbass... You know damn well our perceptions are different..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Everyone calls us Mamiya Takuji, but based on which personality it is at that moment, our brain automatically changes it to Yuuki Tomosane or Minakami Yuki."

name: Tomosane
message: "Plenty of other words are conveniently changed depending on which one of us it is..."

name: Tomosane
message: "It doesn't matter how we perceive the world. Our brain automatically takes care of that, thereby eliminating any discrepancies in our behavior."

name: Yuki
message: "Ugh, I always act perfectly feminine too... That's terrible."

name: Tomosane
message: "Apparently there are some words that our brain simply can't reconcile with reality, or in some cases words we never want to hear. Those words aren't even recognized as sound..."

name: Yuki
message: "Apparently, you say... Well, I guess there's no way to test it, but I've experienced that before and I kind of figured that was the reason."

name: Yuki
message: "Those inconsistencies in perception are always following us around."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, so long as there are multiple personalities... Once our personalities merge into one, though, it shouldn't be a problem."

name: Yuki
message: "Tomosane, I told you... You don't know what's going to happen in the future―"

name: Tomosane
message: "Someone's coming... Coming..."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You deal with her."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Why?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm no good at talking to women..."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? What woman?"
A girl opened the door to the rooftop.
I think her name was Takashima Zakuro... I talked to her once, but I'm not good at dealing with that type of person.
She looks at me with disgust in her eyes, the kind people usually reserve for Mamiya Takuji...
Maybe we hate each other because we're so similar?
Well, either way, Yuki can probably handle her a lot better than me.
Her social skills are really amazing.

name: Yuki
message: "Umm... Who are you?"

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um... I-I'm Takashima Zakuro. I'm in the next class over."

name: Yuki
message: "Takashima... Zakuro?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... You've seen her in the hallway, haven't you?"

name: Yuki
message: "I told you... My short term memory is really bad. How am I supposed to remember something like that?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? Um, i-is something the matter?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, don't worry about it...
It's nothing, ahahahahaha. Sorry... I'm really bad at remembering faces."

name: Zakuro
message: "I see..."

name: Yuki
message: "What are you doing in a place like this?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, uh, nothing in particular."

name: Yuki
message: "Are you cutting class?"

name: Zakuro
message: "W-Well, I guess so."
Wow...
Her personality is exactly what Mamiya Takuji wanted. Her social skills are really great, totally different from mine.
The girl's already starting to calm down.
She would be grimacing in seconds if I tried to talk to her. Probably out of fear, too...
So I can just leave this to her...
She can handle this...

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "M-My room?"
Everything changed in the blink of an eye.
The time and place were both different from before.

name: Tomosane
message: "This is Mamiya Takuji's... No..."
I looked over to the side of the bed... The room was partitioned in the middle, so it looked like two separate rooms, but in reality it was just a single large one.

name: Tomosane
message: "I suppose... it's Minakami Yuki's room too."
Either Takuji or Yuki... One of them came home.

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... I'll never get used to this. It's like all that time just disappeared in a puff of smoke."
My personality was completely swapped out for someone else... and my consciousness was locked away deep within the subconscious...

name: Tomosane
message: "Even sleepwalkers don't have it this bad... This is really ridiculous..."
These strange leaps in time and place... Takuji has to be experiencing the same thing. Doesn't he notice these abnormalities?

name: Tomosane
message: "Actually, I think Yuki said he didn't notice them at all..."
Until just recently, Yuki was aware of these sudden changes in time and place, just like I am.
No, the personality known as 'Minakami Yuki' was created long before I was. She was the first to experience this.
In truth, I've learned a lot from her. It's only thanks to her that I've come to understand what I am...
But she's being gradually cut off from the truth that she's just one of Mamiya Takuji's personalities, so she doesn't notice the inconsistencies like she used to.
At first, she simply didn't think it was odd when she noticed one of those inconsistencies, but now she doesn't even realize there are any inconsistencies.
She said that on rare occasions she could even feel the remnants of her own falsified memories.
If that's true, then perhaps she'll eventually start to attribute my actions and Mamiya Takuji's actions as her own?
Or worse, she might be trapped in an entirely fabricated reality.
I wonder if that could actually happen.
That's just what Yuki told me... I'm not sure if that's actually possible.
Our memories are discontinuous, and Yuki can't even spot the inconsistencies anymore, so she has no way of determining how far gone she is.
Maybe it's just her gut feeling.
When lost within such a labyrinth of cognizances, you can't truly be certain of anything.
And Yuki is lost within that maze right now...
I'll never know what her world is like.
We perceive the world with the same eyes, the same ears, the same brain, and yet... honestly, I never know just what she's looking at.
I lose track of time and place in the blink of an eye.
That's my world.
My memories are never supplemented or falsified... I just experience gaps in time.
What nonsense... My world is discontinuous.
I alone exist within this discontinuous world inside Mamiya Takuji...

name: Tomosane
message: "A discontinuous world, huh? Well, I guess it's fitting for someone in my position."
Fitting. That's the best word for it.
Mamiya Takuji created us so he could run away from reality... That's why he changes reality when it pleases him.
Minakami Yuki is the personality that Mamiya Takuji desired. She's the personality that he will ultimately acquire.
So she doesn't need to know the truth of what's happening. Rather, she should forget it all.
The disappearing memories are the unnecessary ones... They won't be needed in her new life.
He's forcibly instilling consistency in her memories so that she might be the one to live on in the future.
That's Minakami Yuki's situation right now.
Minakami Yuki will be reborn.
Once she's reborn, she'll lose all her memories up until now and live on as the wonderful personality that Mamiya Takuji desired.
But what about me?
He's leaving behind all the inconsistencies and disharmonies as memories.
That's why... I don't have any memory at all of the times when I'm unconscious.
That's my intended state.
Simply because I'm the Destroyer, not the Creator or the Harmonizer...
The Destroyer ends his life with his own destruction, for the sake of the new world.
That's all...
So there's no need for me to have memories.
It doesn't matter if I'm a discontinuous existence.

name: Tomosane
message: "There's nothing I need to have..."
"But you should eat something..."

name: Tomosane
message: "How long have you been there?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I was hiding..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hiding?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah... I couldn't tell who it was."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh... So do you know who it is now?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomosane Nii-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't call me that... Call me Tomosane-san."

name: Hasaki
message: "Welcome home. Dinner's ready, so... eat whenever you want."

name: Tomosane
message: "How about you actually listen to me for once..."

name: Hasaki
message: "But Tomosane Nii-san, you're always telling me I can't do things. I can hardly keep track of them all."

name: Tomosane
message: "There aren't that many things you can't do... Besides, I'm not your brother."

name: Hasaki
message: "But you look like my brother, and... Tomo Nii-san, you're the only one I can talk to anymore."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, don't call me that. That's even worse."

name: Hasaki
message: "But it's easier to say..."

name: Tomosane
message: "There's no way you can call me that."

name: Hasaki
message: "Then we'll compromise with Tomosane Nii-san... That should be fine."

name: Tomosane
message: "No... Don't just go deciding that on your own."

name: Tomosane
message: "Besides, it's not like I'm the only one you can talk to. You can talk to Minakami Yuki, can't you?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, but she's getting further and further away... I can't really talk to her properly anymore."

name: Tomosane
message: "Properly?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I guess we can talk, but... I see her every day, but... she can't see me anymore."

name: Tomosane
message: "She can't see you, huh?"
Now that Yuki's isolation has begun, she's started to see Hasaki and the rabbit doll as two twin girls.
Despite that, there aren't any discrepancies in Yuki's actions... Her perceptions and actions differ from those of the real world.
And yet... Hasaki can still tell.
That Minakami Yuki can't see the real Hasaki anymore...

name: Hasaki
message: "So now you're the only one I can really talk to."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh... Still, don't call me that."

name: Yuki
message: "Be nice to her."

name: Hasaki
message: "Wh-What's wrong?"

name: Tomosane
message: "N-No, it's nothing... Hey, didn't you already show up once today?"

name: Yuki
message: "What, do you have a problem with me showing up more than once a day?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's not what I'm talking about."

name: Hasaki
message: "Wh-Who are you talking to?"

name: Yuki
message: "Long time no see, Hasaki-chan."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, Yuki-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, sorry about the way I've been acting. I haven't really been able to talk to you..."

name: Hasaki
message: "You don't need to apologize... Does that mean you swapped places with Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No, we're both here... It's just creepy seeing an illusionary person standing there next to someone who's real."

name: Yuki
message: "I told you, I'm in the exact same boat here."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yuki-san... you can tell it's me?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, it seems like it's been a few weeks since I last saw you... Is that right?"

name: Hasaki
message: "...It is."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha... So I was right. Well, I'm never aware that I'm doing it. It just felt like the days flew by."

name: Tomosane
message: "What's going on? You said those times when you forgot everything were getting longer, didn't you?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, I did... And they are."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then how did you appear twice in one day?"

name: Yuki
message: "They say a lightbulb is brightest just before it goes out."

name: Tomosane
message: "Just before it goes out... So the only reason you're appearing so much is because you're just about to be cut off..."

name: Yuki
message: "I already told you that."

name: Hasaki
message: "Um, does that mean you won't be able to see me anymore, Yuki? You'll just see... those twins?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, Wakatsuki Kagami and Wakatsuki Tsukasa...
Ahahahahaha... I'm really sorry. I'm trying my best, but I'm forgetting more than I'm remembering lately."

name: Yuki
message: "I just wish I was convincing enough to fool you after I got cut off, though."

name: Tomosane
message: "You can't fool her... She can tell the difference."

name: Yuki
message: "I guess no one else can tell, though... I guess it's just because we're so close. That's why she can tell that I'm seeing something completely different from what she is."

name: Hasaki
message: "But... I'm glad to see you again after so long, Yuki-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, Hasaki."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why do you call her Yuki-san? By your logic, she should be Yuki Nee-san or Yuki Nii-san, shouldn't she?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yuki-san is Yuki-san... She's always been Yuki-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're not even trying to give me a real explanation."

name: Yuki
message: "You can't blame her. I'm a girl on the inside, but I look like a guy on the outside. How's she supposed to call me Nii-san or Nee-san?"

name: Tomosane
message: "On the outside... huh?"
That makes sense. To Hasaki, that's what Yuki looks like.
To me, it looked like Yuki was standing next to Hasaki.
Of course, that Yuki was an illusion. It was nothing more than an image created by my brain.
But that illusion was laughing and talking animatedly with Hasaki. It was hard to shake the feeling that she was actually there.
But Hasaki can't see the Yuki I see at all... She just hears Minakami Yuki's voice from Mamiya Takuji's mouth... It's the same when I talk, too.

name: Tomosane
message: "That's still no reason to call me her brother."

name: Yuki
message: "Meanie... Why are you so stubborn? You're making your big sister sad."

name: Tomosane
message: "And for the record, you're not my sister either!"

name: Yuki
message: "Do you want to be lovers, then?"

name: Hasaki
message: "You can't do that!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, well..."

name: Hasaki
message: "The Yuki-san that you see is really pretty, isn't she?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Who said that?!"

name: Yuki
message: "I did."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't make stuff up! How would you know what you look like to me?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, I am Mamiya Takuji's ideal woman. Why wouldn't I be beautiful?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You might be what Mamiya Takuji's likes, but I'm not into girls like you at all!"

name: Yuki
message: "What, so you prefer petite little girls like Hasaki-chan?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? U-Um!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you dumb? Hasaki's my little sister, isn't she?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh really?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Shit..."

name: Yuki
message: "You just said it yourself. So she's your little sister, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "N-No, I mean physically... Physically, she's my little sister."

name: Yuki
message: "Physically brother and sister? That sounds kind of erotic."

name: Tomosane
message: N-No! Genetically! She's only my sister genetically! I'm a different personality from Mamiya Takuji, so in that way she's not my sister!"

name: Hasaki
message: "How convenient..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "...In other words, you want to treat me like your sister when it's convenient, and like a stranger when it's not."
Wh-What? She's getting really upset for some reason.

name: Hasaki
message: "If you're just a stranger... then make your own dinner, Yuuki-san!"
Hasaki suddenly turned and walked toward the door.

name: Yuki
message: "Look... You could be a little nicer to her, Tomosane."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey!"
Yuki pushed Hasaki toward me.
Hasaki lost her balance and fell into my arms.

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, um, uuh, um..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I-It wasn't me!"
In reality, it probably looked like I had suddenly embraced Hasaki from behind.

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-Yuki did that!"

name: Hasaki
message: "U-U-Umm... It kind of hurts when you squeeze so tightly."

name: Yuki
message: "Come on, you could afford to give her a hug once in a while. You're brother and sister, so it's perfectly normal."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, it's not! I don't know what world you live in, but over here it's not normal to hug your sister like this!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-Yuki-san, is that you?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. Does it feel like I'm pushing you two together?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What exactly are you making us do?!"

name: Yuki
message: "You two should get along... as brother and sister. You're gonna make your big sister sad."

name: Tomosane
message: "I told you, you're not my big sister!"

name: Yuki
message: "But you know... you're gonna be the only one left who can be nice to Hasaki-chan."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, that's not true... That's not true, Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Yes, it is!"
Usually, Yuki is perfectly laid back, but this time she was pretty angry.
I guess Yuki didn't say that to anyone but me... Hasaki just looked at me, apparently not hearing Yuki's outburst.

name: Yuki
message: "You're the only one who can protect Hasaki-chan."

name: Yuki
message: "Why can't you understand that?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's just what you want to believe..."

name: Yuki
message: "Why do you think that?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You're just isolated... You know damn well why that's happening."

name: Tomosane
message: "We were created to protect Hasaki... We each have our role to act out, for Hasaki's sake."

name: Tomosane
message: "For Hasaki, who has nothing, we must kill Mamiya Takuji's existence... and create a new Minakami Yuki personality."

name: Yuki
message: "I told you, that's not set in stone! How am I supposed to protect Hasaki once I'm completely cut off?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You will protect her. Even if she thinks she's protecting Wakatsuki Kagami and Tsukasa, Minakami Yuki will still do anything to protect Tsukasa, who is Hasaki... That's how it's was designed."

name: Yuki
message: "That's not the same as protecting Hasaki-chan!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Who cares if it's the same? The end result is that you'll be protecting Hasaki. Isn't that good enough?"

name: Yuki
message: "What about Hasaki-chan's heart? If I can't protect her heart because I've been cut off from the real world, am I really protecting her?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What more can we do?!"

name: Yuki
message: "I told you to just try being nice to her for once!"

name: Tomosane
message: "My existence is going to disappear. It's your role to protect Hasaki... My role is to destroy the personality known as Mamiya Takuji."

name: Yuki
message: "You're just assuming that's true!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you dumb? It's not just an assumption... Even you know that this was all determined ahead of time."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'll kill Mamiya Takuji, and then I'll disappear... You'll be isolated from that ugly truth, and you'll be the one to protect Hasaki."

name: Yuki
message: "You don't understand anything. You're no better than Takuji... You're just a little brat."

name: Yuki
message: "Do you think the end result is all that matters in life?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You're the little brat! You're constantly jabbering on about nonsense."
For a moment it looked like Yuki was about to say something, but then she just smiled.

name: Yuki
message: "Haa... All right, all right, I said a little too much. I apologize."

name: Yuki
message: "But... you can't protect Hasaki-chan if you never try to understand her feelings."

name: Yuki
message: "Even if you really are going to disappear... you're the only one who can truly talk to her right now..."

name: Yuki
message: "So... just try being a little nicer to her."
Yuki disappeared like a mirage.
As that happened, Hasaki moved away from me.

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, Yuki-san!"

name: Tomosane
message: "If you're looking for Yuki, she's not here anymore."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Really?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... We got into a bit of a fight. I dunno if I ticked her off or what, but she just disappeared."

name: Hasaki
message: "I wonder if I'll get to see the real Yuki again..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, she's always had a strong sense of responsibility.
I'm sure she won't let that be our final farewell... She'll come back soon."

name: Hasaki
message: "...Yeah."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh no, dinner... is probably cold by now."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, probably."

name: Hasaki
message: "I'll warm it up again. Give me like ten minutes... Sorry!"
Hasaki dashed out of the room.
Yuki wanted to say something...
At the end, she held something back.
Even though we're the same person... I can't tell what she's thinking.
Though to be honest, I don't understand myself all that well either.
There isn't very much I know about myself...
I learned of my own existence through pain.
The smell of rusting iron in my nose.
A decaying structure... A condemned building... Those were the kinds of things I could smell...
Ow...
Pain ran through my jaw.
The smell of iron, and... this pain...
Did I bite down on a thumb tack?
No, that's not it...
That's not it...

name: Tomosane
message: "What's... going on?"

name: Iida
message: "What's wrong with him? You give him a concussion or something?"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Hahaha. Mamiya, the world of fighting is kill or be killed."

name: Tomosane
message: "Fighting..."
Two unfamiliar men... One was grabbing my shirt by the lapels.
When I saw that, I noticed my shirt was pretty dirty.
The buttons were torn off... and there was slobber and dried blood on it.
The other two men's shirts were completely clean.
A one-sided fight...
Are these guys really that tough?
Even if they are...

name: Tomosane
message: "It doesn't matter."

name: Shiroyama
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Right..."
I grabbed him by the wrist.
I then used my left hand to drive his wrist into his chest... and my right hand to grab his arm and twist it upward.
My body moved with those ingrained motions.

name: Shiroyama
message: "Agh?!"
When I broke his wrist, he crumpled helplessly.
They're not strong at all...

name: Tomosane
message: "What... That's..."

name: Shiroyama
message: "Gyaaaah!"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's a disappointment."
It was so easy to grab him by the wrist... How did I get beaten up before?

name: Iida
message: "Y-You bastard."

name: Iida
message: "Ugh!"
He clutched his midsection as he fell.
I stomped on his face as he laid on the ground.
He lost consciousness after the first stomp, but I kept stomping his face into the dirt anyway.

name: Shiroyama
message: "Ah!"
When he saw what happened to his friend, the man with the broken wrist screamed.
I guess he lost the will to fight...
I put all my weight into a kick and got him directly in the jaw.
He tried to use his other arm to block it, but he wasn't fast enough, so he fell backward onto his ass.
I straddled him on the ground.

name: Tomosane
message: "You thought I would let you off with just the arm?"

name: Tomosane
message: "My hands are fucked up..."
My fists were covered in a thick layer of blood.
Not just other people's blood, either. My hand was covered in multiple lacerations, each more than ten centimeters long.
Flesh was protruding from the gaping holes.

name: Tomosane
message: "I must have cut myself on their teeth."
I'm sure there were more efficient ways of dealing with them if I just wanted to defeat them.
At the very least, I wouldn't have punched them in the face so many times.
The blood just rushed to my head.

name: Tomosane
message: "Well then, cleanup time..."

name: Shiroyama
message: "S-Stop!"

name: Iida
message: "F-Forgive me!"

name: Iida
message: "Agh!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Eek!"
I stuffed branches in their noses and mouths, and then punched them like that.
Blood flew everywhere.
There was too much blood to see how bad his face looked, but... he would probably need stitches in and around his mouth.

name: Shiroyama
message: "S-Stop..."

name: Tomosane
message: "You never stopped when anyone asked you to, now did you?"
My legs kind of feel breezy...
It was really easy to move, but... it kind of felt like I was wearing a hakama.

name: Tomosane
message: "Why am I wearing a hakama?"
Maybe this was a match... That's why I was wearing clothes for martial arts...

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What is this?!"
It didn't feel breezy because I was wearing a hakama... It was just a regular skirt.

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Why am I wearing a skirt?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-You bastards, what the fuck is this?!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "S-Sorry!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Eek!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You think you can apologize for this?!"
Why would they make me wear something like this?
This is a girl's uniform. Why am I wearing a girl's uniform?

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-You little punks!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "E-Eek!"

name: Iida
message: "P-Please! You'll kill us!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ugh!"
Fearing the worst, I... checked my underwear.
The underwear was...
Incredibly soft... and very tight.
The parts that felt kind of rough... were probably lace...
This isn't anything a man should be wearing.

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-You bastards... What did you make me put on?"

name: Iida
message: "Eek!"
I was more than just angry... I was desperate...
Why am I...
Wearing this...
What the fuck was happening up until now?
Wearing girls' clothing...
And they even made me put on girls' underwear... Is that why it feels so wet down there?

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-You bastards..."

name: Iida
message: "Eek!"
I inflicted as much pain as possible without killing them.
This time I focused on inflicting pain on parts of their body other than their faces.
They might not be able to hold a pencil for a while...
I took one of their uniforms.
It was a bit loose, but it was better than nothing.
I couldn't do anything about the underwear, so I just didn't wear any.
It's not like a man has anything to be embarrassed about if they don't want to wear any underwear.

name: Tomosane
message: "I can't believe this..."
Even if I had no recollection of the event... I can't believe they would do that to me. What utter humiliation. It makes me want to hurt myself...

name: Tomosane
message: "Disgusting..."
I was too scared to ask what happened before.
If I asked, I would have killed them when I heard the answer.

name: Tomosane
message: "I wiped it off with a tissue, but..."
That sticky stuff on my body must have been semen.
Well, my ass doesn't hurt, so at least the worst thing possible didn't happen... I'd like to believe it didn't, anyway.

name: Tomosane
message: "Is getting fucked in the ass really the worst thing possible?"
Thinking about it, it wouldn't be odd if they had done that... I'm getting depressed just thinking about it.

name: Tomosane
message: "What the hell did they do to me?"
Just to be safe, I rinsed out my mouth too. I didn't know what the hell happened.

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, whatever... I'll just torture these fuckers until they want to die."

name: Shiroyama
message: "I'm so sorry, I'm so sorry..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmm?"
"Uuuhg... Uahhh..."
What?
That sound... isn't one of the guys from before...
This voice...
I heard someone's voice from the clothes I took off.

name: Tomosane
message: "What is this?"
This whimpering voice... I think I've heard it before...
I think I heard it... before I came to exist...
The discarded clothes rose up and filled out.
After the process was complete...

name: Takuji
message: "Please stop... Don't hit me anymore..."

name: Tomosane
message: "...Mamiya... Takuji..."
The discarded clothes on the ground... turned into Mamiya Takuji.
Mamiya Takuji was still wearing that female uniform as he lay there on the ground, curled into a ball and bawling his eyes out.
Somehow, I understood everything once I saw that.
Where I was... Where I should be going...
I instantly knew what I was and why I existed.

name: Tomosane
message: "In a way, maybe I'm blessed."
Do other people have such a clear raison d'etre?
No, they suffer because they don't...
But I have been blessed.
Because I was born with a reason to exist, no matter what that reason is, it is a blessing.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey!"

name: Takuji
message: "I'm so sorry! I'm so sorry!"

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you doing?"

name: Takuji
message: "I'm so sorry, I'm so sorry. Please don't hit me anymore..."

name: Takuji
message: "Eek!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, you... I didn't ask for an apology. I asked what you're doing."

name: Takuji
message: "Ah, I'm so sorry!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why are you wearing girls' clothes?"

name: Takuji
message: "U-Um, these are..."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's nasty... Is that some new fad?"
Every time I hit him... I felt the same pain.
It was completely different from when I was hitting those other guys.
I share the same body as this nasty fucker.
I'm a separate personality born within this disgusting human being.
And my raison d'etre is...

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, you... How about you give me a good explanation for this..."

name: Takuji
message: "Eek!"
To erase Mamiya Takuji...
To eradicate Mamiya Takuji's personality and purge him from this body.
That's what he wanted me to do.
He made me for the purpose of his own destruction.
That's why...

name: Tomosane
message: "Come on!"
I felt intense pain every time I punched him... Every punch lit my brain up with pain.
I have pretty good technique...
Even I'm impressed... I never would've thought this tiny body was capable of inflicting so much pain.

name: Tomosane
message: "Do you get turned on when you wear those clothes?! Fucking disgusting!"

name: Takuji
message: "I-It's not like I wanted to... Ah!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yes, you did!"
It was through pain that I first came into existence.
That pain turned into light... and then when my vision cleared...
The pain sewed together the world's seams.
But the world isn't light.
The world isn't vision.
I experienced that firsthand.
Existence isn't only defined by vision.
Then is it defined by the five senses?
Sight, sound, touch, taste, and smell... Is the world the totality of the things which one can sense?
Is it enough to simply see the world?
Is it enough to simply hear the world?
The world's texture.
The world's taste.
For instance, the taste of dirt.
The smell of grass.
The feel of the wind.
The sound of trees swaying in the distance.
And the great blue sky above.
I saw the clouds racing across the blue sky, I heard the sound of the city, I felt the wind, and I tasted saliva.
That is the world.
The things I can feel make up the world.
Everything that has been given to me is the world.
Most people understand it to be so.
But is it truly so?
I didn't believe that for a second.
As one who exists only momentarily, I won't accept lies such as 'the world is everything you can perceive in a given moment.'
Everything I can perceive is neither the world nor the world's limits.
I learned that fact.
I know a world that I can't see, hear, touch, or taste.
Beyond the edge of the world... I know things that I'll never see, never touch, never feel.
It's simple.
I was born in this moment.
I should know nothing more than what I can perceive at this moment.
I know nothing.
And yet, this building that I'm looking at right now... Even if I can't see its interior, I know its interior.
I can imagine what lies on the other side of that wall... I can imagine what lies beyond the sky...
What's more, I know the meaning of many things impossible to experience.
That's perfectly natural.
For instance, say someone passes a house every morning on their way to school. It doesn't matter who it is.
A normal house that doesn't stand out in any way.
That someone sees the house's door every morning.
Not a door that anyone would pay attention to.
Why don't we fear what lies on the other side of that door?
Beyond that door...
That could very well be the edge of the world.
At the very least, we've never seen what lies on the other side.
We can't deny the possibility that the world's limit lies on the other side of that door.
And yet.
We know.
Nothing unknown to us lies on the other side...
There's no way the edge of the world could lie on the other side of that door.
If one doesn't fear when turning a corner they've never turned before, then they have no reason to fear that door.
I know that the world also consists of scenes we will never see in our lifetime.
Sight is not the world.
Hearing is not the world.
Neither is touch, taste, or smell...
It can't even be pain.
Then what is the world?
The answer isn't actually very complicated.
The world... is everything that can be put into words.
The world... is everything that has meaning.
Truth... and fiction.
There is such a difference...
But it's not so complicated...
There's no need to make it sound complicated.
There's no need to dwell upon the unknowable.

name: Takuji
message: "Agh... Ahh..."

name: Tomosane
message: "My hand... won't open anymore..."
I punched too much... I beat three people to a pulp in such a short time...
If I truly wanted to destroy them... I could've done it with a tenth as much effort, but my goal was to inflict pain.
I used my fist more than necessary.

name: Tomosane
message: "Take that off... It's nasty."

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't question me."

name: Tomosane
message: "Take it off!"

name: Takuji
message: "The underwear too?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course! Take off all those girls' clothes!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hhk!"
I took the female uniform away from him.
When I looked at the nametag, it said Takashima Zakuro.
I cleaned the dirty underwear in the sink and used some tissues to get the dirt off the uniform.

name: Tomosane
message: "This girl is such a pain..."
Maybe I could've just washed it in the laundry, but that girl was probably in quite a bind without her uniform.
I found a bag to stick her uniform in and headed to her classroom.
That one...?
There was one lonesome student still in her P.E. uniform.
It looked just like someone had bullied her and hidden her uniform...

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... These guys are such a pain in the ass."
Even if those bullies made him do it, it was still Takuji who actually stole these clothes... It's really not a good situation.
I walked up to the crestfallen girl anyway.

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-Who are you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "These were stolen, right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Your uniform... is in here..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-Who are you?"
I almost said Yuuki Tomosane, but I managed to stop myself in time.
No one by that name exists.

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm Mamiya Takuji... I'm in the next class over."

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-Why?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Who knows... Anyway, I'm giving them back."

name: Tomosane
message: "What?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, it looks like you're really hurt..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmm? Really?"
I touched my own face with my hand.
It was covered in cuts and bruises.

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um, did you get this back for me?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No, that's not it..."

name: Zakuro
message: "But you're hurt."

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... I was threatened and forced to steal it. I came to return it."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's all..."
I quickly left without saying anything else.
Partly because I didn't want to associate with anyone Mamiya Takuji didn't know...
But more importantly, I'm no good at dealing with women.

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... What a mess..."
It's after school... The sun is low in the sky.
I was alone in the hallway, puzzled...
People know nothing at the moment of their birth.
A newborn infant can't even look out at the world.
At the moment of birth, the only thing they see is light.
Their eyes can't even decipher shapes or colors.
I was just... less than an hour ago, born into this world.

And yet I could already differentiate colors and objects, and I had high level language skills (compared to an infant, anyway)... Common sense (at least enough to tell where I am)... and on top of that, I apparently had some skill in martial arts.
I had far greater knowledge, intelligence, and skill than an infant.
But on the other hand, there were many things I didn't know.
For instance, who I was...
No, I knew my name was Yuuki Tomosane.
I also understood that I was an alternate personality created by Mamiya Takuji's unstable mental state.
But other than that... For instance, Mamiya Takuji's family, grade, friends, etc. I didn't know any of those.
I didn't even know where Mamiya Takuji's house is.

name: Tomosane
message: "Now then..."
What should I do from here on out?
There was a lot I knew, but also a lot I didn't.

name: Tomosane
message: "...What should I do now?"
"...What are you gonna do?"
That was a completely unknown sensation.
No... It reminded me of one thing...
It was close to the feeling of my birth... A pain that somehow felt like a sound.

name: Tomosane
message: "Who's there?!"
I turned to face the voice I heard, but no one was there.

name: Tomosane
message: "Ugh!"
This pain... No, is this the voice?
The voice resounded inside my head...
"What... You're totally useless..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Who are you?! Agh..."
It was the same voice...
Every time I heard the voice, a sensation almost like pain raced through my brain.

name: Tomosane
message: "Damn it..."
I looked for the owner of that voice...
I surveyed the hallway. I didn't see anyone.
What is this... This is so annoying...

name: Tomosane
message: "What is this feeling?"
"Look at me... Yuuki Tomosane-kun."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What?"
Just now... they called my name...
How would anyone know my name?
"Huh? Did I get your name wrong? But Yuuki Tomosane fits, I think... You're not Mamiya Tomosane, are you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Who are you?"
My eyes had lost their focus.
It was like I was listening to a radio that wasn't quite tuned in to a station... That was the only way to describe that strange feeling.
"Jeez, you're no good at this... Well, whatever..."
Someone hit me with a powerful blow in the chest, knocking me back.
I had felt the same thing sometime in the past... Or maybe that was just my imagination.
I was just born into this world today. I didn't have any memories of my own.
Then are those memories of Mamiya Takuji's past?
Is this someone who Mamiya Takuji has been struck by in the past?
No, now's not the time to be thinking about that.
The direction of the next attack.
I took up a defensive stance facing the direction the attack had come from.
Someone definitely just hit me. That's all.
There's no way my attacker could be invisible...
They have to be hiding somehow.
I sharpened my senses...
"Good, good... You're one to pay attention in battle, I see. I like kids like you, Tomosane."
I turned to the voice.
A person that wasn't there before...
I was shocked to see her standing there, calm and composed, as if she had been there the whole time.

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Who are you?!"

name: Yuki
message: "I wonder... Who am I?"
She wasn't tall.
Her body was thin too.
And more importantly... she wasn't a man.
Was it really this woman that just hit me?
That's hard to believe.
More importantly... Why is she attacking me?
No reason came to mind.
The reason my body remembered these attacks was probably because Mamiya Takuji had experienced a similar attack.
If so...

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you with those thugs from earlier?"

name: Yuki
message: "What thugs? Oh... those guys? Shiroyama, Numada, and Nishimura, you mean?"

name: Tomosane
message: "So I was right... Did you come to pay me a personal visit because I trashed your lackies?"

name: Yuki
message: "...What? Haha, your big sister is really disappointed, Tomosane. I didn't think you were stupid... Well, have it your way."

name: Tomosane
message: "Ugh!"

name: Yuki
message: "Whoa!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, scary, scary... You're really fast..."
What's the meaning of this... She's so strong... She's nothing like those guys I fought earlier.
I can't believe this woman is beating me...

name: Yuki
message: "Oh my, you look positively stunned. The world's a big place, you know? There are bound to be a few people stronger than you... maybe even a few women."

name: Tomosane
message: "The world's a big place, but the school not so much."
What's going on?
I wouldn't lose to amateurs no matter how many of them came at me at once, but against this woman...
She's strong... Maybe even stronger than me...

name: Yuki
message: "Well, I'm sorry to do this in the middle of battle, but let me introduce myself. I'm Minakami Yuki, your big sister."

name: Tomosane
message: "Big sister?"

name: Yuki
message: "You're open!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Uck!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Guh!"

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahahahaha, you're so naive, Tomosane! But I'll give it to you, that was a good block."

name: Tomosane
message: "Th-That was dirty!"

name: Yuki
message: "You had such a dumb look on your face that I just couldn't stop myself from going in for at least one cheap shot."

name: Tomosane
message: "What do you mean, one?! You tried to hit me four times, you bastard!"

name: Yuki
message: "I'm not a bastard. I'm a girl, you know."

name: Tomosane
message: "Shut up!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa, haa, haaa..."
What's with this woman... It's like she knows what I'm going to do before I do it...

name: Tomosane
message: "Who the hell are you?"

name: Yuki
message: "I told you, I'm your big sister."

name: Tomosane
message: "Our surnames are completely different!"

name: Yuki
message: "Maybe it's possible for your sister to have a different surname."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, so you're my stepsister, then..."

name: Yuki
message: "Nope."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then what are you?"

name: Yuki
message: "I already told you, I'm your big sister."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't toy with me!"

name: Yuki
message: "I'm not toying with you. Can't you trust anyone, Tomosane?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Shut up! Why should I trust you after you attacked me and then bullshitted me with your lies?!"

name: Yuki
message: "What's your problem? You should trust me. I'm just trying to be a nice big sister!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't think I would call anyone nice after they assaulted me!"

name: Yuki
message: "That's because you wouldn't trust me."

name: Tomosane
message: "What the hell do you mean, trust? You're the one who hit first!"

name: Yuki
message: "But I'm a girl. You have to give me a handicap..."

name: Tomosane
message: "A handicap has nothing to do with it. No one would attack their own brother out of nowhere like that!"

name: Yuki
message: "Sure they would."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're not my fucking sister!"

name: Tomosane
message: "After all, I only exist inside Mamiya Takuji's mi―! ...Wait."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, you finally figured it out?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you..."

name: Yuki
message: "That's right... I was born before you, so you should be looking up to me. I'm your big sister, Minakami Yuki."

name: Tomosane
message: "Before me?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, we're two souls sharing Mamiya Takuji's body."

name: Tomosane
message: "An alternate personality..."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, though I guess since he has three souls in one body, most people would probably just say he's possessed or something."

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't think so... They call that dissociative identity disorder."

name: Yuki
message: "Dissociative identity disorder... I suppose we're both products of his dissociation and mental trauma, then."

name: Yuki
message: "Not that it really matters. Why don't you take a look at your own body?"

name: Tomosane
message: "My body?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wha-? The bruises?!"
The bruises where she hit me earlier were disappearing... while the ones from my fight earlier were still there...

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Why?"

name: Yuki
message: "It's not like we actually fought just now... You weren't punching yourself, you know?"

name: Yuki
message: "That was just a mock fight... Well, we could fight for real if we really wanted, but it wouldn't accomplish much. You'd hurt yourself just as much as you'd hurt me."

name: Tomosane
message: "We'd hurt ourselves with every blow?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. Anyone else watching us would just see someone hitting himself..."

name: Yuki
message: "And for the record, if anyone saw that battle just now, it would look like we were just standing there, lost in thought... Like we were spacing out, I guess?"

name: Yuki
message: "This whole conversation would pretty much be the same too."

name: Tomosane
message: "This conversation too..."

name: Yuki
message: "Yep. If you think of it like a telephone, it's the difference between an internal line and an external line. Or maybe it's closer to the difference between LAN and an Internet connection?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I see... So everything that just happened was inside my head..."

name: Yuki
message: "That's why I can do all that without worrying."
It feels like this is the same conversation...
But something's a little different...

name: Yuki
message: "Do you understand?"

name: Tomosane
message: "This is..."

name: Yuki
message: "Now you're actually using your body and speaking the words. That's fine and all, but I don't really recommend it. You know, just in case someone's watching."

name: Tomosane
message: "It would look like... I was talking to myself..."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, pretty much... Well, not like it really matters when it's just the two of us."

name: Yuki
message: "And that's about all. Once again, nice to meet you. I'm your big sister, Minakami Yuki."

name: Tomosane
message: "...No, how does that make you my big sister?"

name: Yuki
message: "We were both made by the same person, and I came first. That makes me your big sister, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No, not really."

name: Yuki
message: "Call me Yuki-nee from now on."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, right..."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, you're getting better."

name: Tomosane
message: "You gave away your secret. Now I know what you're doing, what you know, what you're thinking..."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh my, so you've figured out how I'm fighting?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, we share the same body... We can feel each other's movements just before each attack."

name: Tomosane
message: "If you just follow the movements of my body, you can react much faster than if you were reacting by sight."

name: Yuki
message: "Exactly. Well, it'll only be useful against me and Takuji, though."

name: Tomosane
message: "But... it's not that easy to react to the movements of your own body."

name: Yuki
message: "Exactly... For a moment, our brain treats it as our own body's movement. There's a time lag in recognizing it as the other's movement."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmm... So then, what are you..."

name: Yuki
message: "How many times do I have to tell you? I'm Minakami Yuki... I'm a personality that was created before you."

name: Tomosane
message: "By Mamiya Takuji?"

name: Yuki
message: "I guess so... Well, he's not aware of it himself, so maybe I shouldn't say he made me."

name: Tomosane
message: "So then, why are you still attacking me?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hehehe... You seem like a brat is all. I just wanted to make it clear that I'm your superior."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmph... I already know everything you try to do."

name: Yuki
message: "Hehehe, you're so dumb... I'll show you the fruits of years of labor."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wha-!"

name: Yuki
message: "How about that!"

name: Tomosane
message: "The fuck do you mean! Are you dumb?! Why are you flashing your panties everywhere with that high kick?!"

name: Yuki
message: "It hit, didn't it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I was surprised, you dumbass! Of course it hit!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, what? Are you interested in my underwear?"

name: Tomosane
message: "As if."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"
She held her leg up like in the last kick, and then she grabbed my arm.

name: Yuki
message: "Fighting dirty..."

name: Tomosane
message: "S-Stupid... You lifted up your leg for that... Ugh?!"

name: Yuki
message: "It's elementary～"

name: Tomosane
message: "Guh!"
That dumbass... She made it look like she was going to do the same kick, and then she went for an arm lock instead.
In a place like a hallway... that's dangerous...
And with her panties on display, too...
In her own words.

name: Yuki
message: "Who cares? No one but you can see them."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's exactly the problem!"

name: Yuki
message: "We're siblings, so I don't really care about that. Well, if I didn't have any panties on, we might have a problem, though."

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course we would!"
Minakami Yuki has never had much common sense, but either way, she taught me a lot of things.
This first fight taught me how to use my body.
Particularly, it taught me how to align the channels of my perception.
The way to meet Mamiya Takuji and Minakami Yuki (though it only works when I exist at the same time as either of them).
And how to avoid meeting Mamiya any time he comes into existence (though it doesn't work on Yuki, since she knows how to align the channels as well).
There were plenty of other things she taught me.
About Mamiya Takuji.
About Hasaki, his little sister.
About Mamiya's family.
About the Wakatsukis.
About Hakushuukyou Bar and Master.
Plenty of other things...
She's the only reason I have to live.
Though I would never admit it to her.
Anytime she brought it up, I changed the subject.

name: Tomosane
message: "I never told her that..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san, I warmed up your food."
Hasaki called for me from downstairs.

name: Tomosane
message: "I told you to stop calling me Tomo Nii-san!"
I yelled back down the stairs at her.
